title: powerFactorCorrection
description: The description of a Power Factor Correction (PFC) stage. PFC converters shape the input current to follow the input voltage waveform, achieving near-unity power factor. The inductor operates with a triangular current ripple superimposed on a half-sinusoidal envelope. This topology covers both continuous (CCM) and discontinuous (DCM) conduction modes across the standard single-phase and three-phase variants (boost, bridgeless, totem-pole, interleaved boost, Vienna, etc.).

inputVoltage.description: The AC input voltage (RMS) with tolerance range (e.g., 85-265V universal input)

outputVoltage.description: The DC output voltage (typically 385-400V for universal input)

lineFrequency.description: The AC line frequency (50 or 60 Hz)

switchingFrequency.description: The switching frequency of the PFC stage

currentRippleRatio.description: The peak-to-peak current ripple as a ratio of the average current (typically 0.2-0.4 for CCM)

efficiency.description: The target efficiency of the PFC stage

mode.description: The conduction mode of the PFC

topologyVariant.description: The PFC topology variant. 'boost' is the classical single-phase boost PFC (full-bridge rectifier + boost stage), the default. 'bridgeless' / 'semiBridgeless' / 'totemPole' eliminate the input rectifier bridge for higher efficiency. 'interleavedBoost' uses N>=2 parallel boost cells phase-shifted for ripple cancellation. 'vienna' is the 3-phase 3-level rectifier used in telecom and EV chargers. 'buck' / 'buckBoost' / 'sepic' / 'cuk' are step-down or buck-boost variants used in low-power LED drivers and isolated PFC stages.

numberOfPhases.description: Number of parallel phases / interleaved cells. 1 for boost/bridgeless/totemPole/buck variants; 2 or 3 for interleavedBoost; 3 for vienna.

wideBandgapSwitch.description: Whether the active switches are wide-bandgap (GaN/SiC) devices. Required true for totem-pole CCM PFC (Si MOSFET body-diode reverse recovery makes CCM totem-pole infeasible).

bulkCapacitance.description: The DC bus bulk capacitance in farads. Used by the operating-point synthesis to compute the twice-line-frequency bus-voltage ripple: ΔVbus ≈ Pout / (2·π·f_line·Cbus·Vbus). Sized in practice from hold-up-time requirements (~1–4 µF/W of output power for 230 Vrms input, 400 V bus, 20 ms hold-up).

diodeVoltageDrop.description: The voltage drop on the boost diode

maximumSwitchCurrent.description: The maximum current rating of the switch (optional constraint)

ambientTemperature.description: The ambient temperature for the application

pfcModes.description: The conduction mode of the PFC
pfcModes.title: pfcModes

pfcTopologyVariants.description: The PFC topology variant. See `topologyVariant` field for descriptions.
pfcTopologyVariants.title: pfcTopologyVariants
